curation_notes: Primary locations derived from the advisory description which explicitly references the AddCert handler in api/certificate/certificate.go and the WriteFile function in internal/cert/write_file.go. The patch adds input validation bindings (publickey_path, privatekey_path, publickey, privatekey) to the certJson struct used by both AddCert and ModifyCert, preventing arbitrary paths from reaching WriteFile. The patch is noisy (7 non-test files changed) because it also refactors the validation initialization from api/api.go into a new internal/validation package and adds certificate content validation helpers. The vulnerability class path-traversal matches the pre-assigned CWE-22 and the advisory description of arbitrary file write via unsanitized paths.
